title: Extraterrestrial: The First Sign of Intelligent Life Beyond Earth

description.en: Avi Loeb's 2021 Houghton Mifflin Harcourt argument that the interstellar object ʻOumuamua may have been an artifact of extraterrestrial technology — by the Harvard astrophysicist who founded the Galileo Project. The corpus engages it as a contemporary scientific entry into the extraterrestrial-contact question framing the embassy.
